c.d: Number of unique users who actively engage with the app within a 30-day period
c.s: App store analytics, Sensor Tower, App Annie, company reports

c.d: Average user rating score based on app store reviews and ratings
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

c.d: Total number of app downloads across all platforms since launch
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, third-party analytics platforms

c.d: Monthly gross revenue generated through in-app purchases, advertisements, and subscriptions
c.s: Sensor Tower, App Annie, company financial reports

c.d: Assessment of gameplay mechanics, graphics quality, story depth, and overall user experience
c.s: Gaming review sites, user feedback analysis, expert reviews
